name: Meshcapade
description: AI platform for digital humans with APIs to generate 3D avatars and markerless motion capture from video, text or images.

seo.title: Meshcapade — AI API / SDK for Developers
seo.meta_description: Meshcapade: AI platform for digital humans with APIs to generate 3D avatars and markerless motion capture from video, text or images.

when_to_use: Generating realistic 3D human body meshes from measurements or video
Building virtual try-on features with parametric human avatars
Animating 3D characters from motion capture or pose estimation
Creating diverse synthetic human data for computer vision training

pros: Realistic 3D body models from video or text
cons: Steep learning curve for non-3D teams
review.verdict: A real technical edge for teams doing digital humans or mocap without rigs.
review.best_for: Game, VFX and fashion studios generating 3D avatars from video
review.not_for: General 2D creative or consumer avatar apps
